# Passio v2.3

### Seeds plugin system, 124-entry Orchard, full docs site.

*567 files changed · 30 827 insertions*

</div>

This release turns Passio from "a desktop AI assistant" into **an extensible platform**. A full plugin system (Seeds), a curated registry (the Orchard), a monetization rail (ed25519 license signatures verified locally), a dedicated docs site, bidirectional Obsidian sync, a consolidated 6-tab HUD, autostart on login, click-through when collapsed — and a lot more.

Short version: you can now build a Passio plugin in an afternoon, ship it for free via the Orchard or sell it on Gumroad with zero Passio taking a cut. The host enforces every declared permission at runtime.

## 🌟 Highlights

- 🌱 **Seeds plugin system** — sandboxed Bun Workers per seed with capability-gated `passio` API (network, secrets, kv, bubble, todos, notes, mail, calendar). Manifest declares permissions + contributes (tools / tabs / widgets / hotkeys / scheduler / events / settings). Web-Component panels mount in sandboxed iframes.
- 🛒 **The Orchard** — curated seed registry at [`orchard/index.json`](https://github.com/alexandergese/passio/blob/main/orchard/index.json). 124 entries: **100 free + 24 paid**. Browse inside Passio's **Grow → Discover**, or on the docs site.
- ♾ **Autonomous retrigger loops** — give Passio a task, it plans sub-steps, executes, re-plans, runs until 100% done (or hits hard caps on steps / cost / replans). Live step log in the **Auto** tab. Cancel any moment.
- 📚 **Two-way Obsidian sync** — notes flow both ways, checkboxes in `Todo.md` round-trip instantly, daily recap appends with a configurable path template.
- 🎭 **Cascading personality picker** — 5 archetypes × 5 tones × 5 flavors = 125 voices. Plus a free-form prompt override for the pedantic.
- 🧩 **HUD consolidation** — 14 tabs collapsed into 6 (**Chat / Do / Know / Pulse / Grow / Settings**), with sub-tabs inside each. Drag-reorder + show/hide every header chip (including seed-declared widgets).
- 🖱 **Click-through fix** — collapsed bubble shrinks to 128×128 so the rest of your desktop is fully clickable.
- 🚀 **Autostart on login** + `.seed` files double-click-installable + app icon replaced with a sprout SVG set (6 variants to pick from).
- 📖 **Full docs site** — `apps/docs` is a Next.js 14 + shadcn/ui site that reads the repo's markdown + orchard index at build time. 25 pages static-prerendered.

## 🌱 Seeds in detail

### What a seed gets

```ts
passio.tools.register({ name, description, input, execute })   // callable by the chat agent
passio.tabs.register({ id, title, icon, panel })               // contributes a tab
passio.widgets.register({ id, slot: 'header'|'corner' })       // chip in the header strip
passio.hotkeys.register({ id, default, onTrigger })            // global shortcut
passio.schedule({ cron, every_seconds }, handler)              // background loop
passio.on('chat'|'scan'|'activity'|'bubble_state'|'hotkey')    // react to host events
passio.kv.{get,set,del}                                        // seed-scoped KV
passio.net.fetch(url)                                          // hosts in permissions.network only
passio.secrets.{get,set}                                       // declared names only, vault-backed
passio.bubble.speak(msg) / todos.add / notes.save              // write into Passio's core stores
passio.mail.unread / mail.send / calendar.upcoming             // Passio's built-in tools
```

### Free seeds (100)

Bundled in `seeds/`, listed in `orchard/index.json`. Highlights by category:

- **Widgets (15)** — clock-sync · moon-phase · stock-ticker · crypto-ticker · timezone-ring · pomodoro-chip · battery-chip · ping-chip · commute-chip · air-quality · standup-countdown · rain-warning · meeting-soon · water-reminder · current-sprint-day
- **Inbox (10)** — slack-unread · discord-mentions · telegram-bridge · signal-bridge · email-scheduler · email-undo-send · email-snooze · mail-digest · smart-bcc · vcard-attacher
- **News (9)** — lobsters-pulse · reddit-digest · rss-digest · github-trending · arxiv-fresh · podcast-new-episodes · youtube-subs · obsidian-starred · twitter-bookmarks
- **Calendar (8)** — weekly-review · monthly-review · birthdays · time-box-timer · flow-timer · meetings-this-week · no-meeting-wednesdays · calendar-heatmap
- **Developer (12)** — github-pr-dashboard · github-issues-assigned · git-repo-health · branch-age-warn · npm-outdated · cargo-outdated · eslint-on-save · commit-message-coach · pr-description-writer · git-stash-browser · lang-learner · api-latency-watch
- **Research (10)** — pdf-drop · highlighter · citation-formatter · wiki-grab · yt-transcript · glossary · quote-collector · question-log · ideas-parking-lot · book-reading-tracker
- **Productivity (10)** — habit-tracker · weekly-goal-recap · daily-intent · eisenhower-sorter · anti-distraction-timer · focus-playlist · morning-routine · evening-routine · journaling-prompt · mood-tracker
- **Fun (10)** — compliment-fairy · mood-emoji · weather-haiku · word-of-the-day · on-this-day · desktop-wallpaper-rotator · screen-time-shame · fake-coworker · rubber-duck-button · curiosity-log
- **Integrations (10)** — notion-mirror · linear-triage · jira-stand-up · trello-board · airtable-query · spotify-now-playing · lastfm-scrobble · strava-week · weight-tracker · sleep-score
- **Meta (5)** — seed-playground · seed-doctor · vault-link-doctor · secret-audit · log-tailer

### Seed developer tooling

- `bunx @passio/seed-cli init <name>` — scaffolds a seed with manifest + entry + panel + README
- `passio-seed build .` — produces `dist/<name>.seed` (a signed pointer descriptor)
- `passio-seed dev .` — hot-reloads into the running Passio (file watcher + worker restart)
- `license-gen init <name>` — generates an ed25519 keypair
- `license-gen sign --seed <name> --buyer <email>` — mints a signed license after a sale

## 🧩 HUD changes

### 6 tabs (down from 14)

| Tab | Rolled-in sub-surfaces |
|---|---|
| 💬 **Chat** | + history search (flip button) |
| ✓ **Do** | Todos + Goals + Auto-loop |
| 🧠 **Know** | Memory browser + Vault editor + Reflect |
| 📊 **Pulse** | Activity + Focus + Cost + Errors (with red-dot badge) |
| 🌱 **Grow** | Seeds + Browser extension |
| ⚙ **Settings** | unchanged internal nav + new Header section |

### Header chip customization

Drag-to-reorder + show/hide every chip. Works for built-ins (weather, calendar ticker, mail pill, pomodoro, what-next, spotlight, auto-speak, posture) AND for any header-widget contributed by an installed seed. Layout persists to a `header_layout` setting. New seed widgets land as hidden by default.

### Click-through fixed

When the bubble is collapsed + no overlays showing, the OS window shrinks to 128×128 (just the avatar), so the rest of the screen is clickable. Grows to 500×760 when you expand or when a speech bubble / clipboard chip / spotlight opens.

### Autopilot + safety

The autonomous retrigger loop lives in the **Auto** tab. Every loop logs plan → step_start → step_done → assess → replan → complete, and tracks cost per-step. Caps (20 steps / $0.50 / 4 replans by default) are per-loop. Cancel button kills the current step cleanly.

## 📚 Obsidian sync (bidirectional)

- `note_save` → `<vault>/passio/<title>.md` with frontmatter
- Edits in `<vault>/passio/` flow back into Passio's `notes` table + re-embed
- Deleting a passio-owned file removes the row
- `Todo.md` marker block round-trips (tick `[x]` → DB done, complete in Passio → rewrites the block)
- Daily recap appends to a configurable path template (`daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md` by default, supports `Journal/YYYY/MM/DD.md`-style layouts)
- Watcher restarts cleanly on vault-root change
- New RPC `passio.vault.status` reports watcher health + indexed note count

## 🎭 Personality + voice

- First-run wizard step 6 walks a 5×5×5 tree (125 leaves). Each leaf = prompt fragment + TTS voice + autonomy posture default.
- **Settings → Persona** adds a free-form text area for a custom prompt override. Agent concatenates both.
- Cycle autonomy mid-session via the posture chip: 🌙 Quiet → ☀ Active → ⚡ Proactive+.

## 🚀 OS integration

- **Autostart** — `~/.config/autostart/passio.desktop` wires login-time launch. Exec line falls through `passio-desktop` on PATH → `~/.local/bin` → `target/release` → `target/debug` so it works whether you installed the `.deb` or run from source.
- **App launcher entry** — `~/.local/share/applications/passio.desktop` registers with keywords ("ai", "assistant", "passionfruit", "jarvis").
- **`.seed` files** — MIME type `application/x-passio-seed` registered, icon installed at 32/128/256, `xdg-mime default passio.desktop` set — double-click installs the plugin.
- **Tauri file-association** — the app handles `.seed` paths passed as argv for macOS/Windows bundles when those arrive.

## 💵 Other notable additions

- **Cost dashboard** — per-tier token + $ tracking across economy / standard / power / reasoning / TTS / Whisper / embedding. Hourly budget-check scheduler fires a bubble alert when daily or monthly caps are crossed.
- **Data export/import** — tarball of DB + seeds + secrets (vault excluded; rsync yourself). Settings → About.
- **HUD updater UI** — "Check for updates" button wired to `tauri-plugin-updater` + `tauri-plugin-opener`.
- **Mobile PWA streaming** — `/stream/chat` SSE endpoint on the sidecar bridge. Mobile app now renders tokens live with a caret.
- **Seed auto-update check** — per-seed diff against the remote manifest's `version`; one-click reinstall in Grove.
- **6 app icon variants** — `apps/desktop/src-tauri/icons/variants/` — sprout-warm, fruit-whole, fruit-sliced, bloom, vine, minimal. Swap in anytime.
- **`prefers-reduced-motion`** honored throughout the HUD.

## 📦 Install

### `.deb` (Debian / Ubuntu / Kali)

Grab `Passio_2.2.0_amd64.deb` from the release assets, then:

```bash
sudo dpkg -i Passio_2.2.0_amd64.deb
sudo apt -f install    # resolve runtime deps if needed
```

After install, **Passio is in your app menu and autostarts on next login**.

### AppImage

The AppImage builder (`linuxdeploy`) crashed on the GTK plugin pass during this release. The `.deb` is the recommended format on Linux. I'll retry the AppImage build for v2.3.1.

### Build from source

```bash
sudo apt install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev \
  librsvg2-dev libxdo-dev build-essential libssl-dev xsel
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
cargo install tauri-cli --version "^2.0"

git clone https://github.com/alexandergese/passio.git
cd passio
bun install
bun run --cwd apps/desktop tauri:build
```

Produces `apps/desktop/src-tauri/target/release/bundle/deb/Passio_2.2.0_amd64.deb`.

## 🔁 Upgrade path from v2.2.x

No data migration required. The sidecar runs all migrations on first boot.

Things that changed and might surprise existing users:

- **Tabs are renamed.** If you had muscle memory: `todos` / `goals` / `auto` are now inside **Do** · `memory` / `vault` / `reflection` inside **Know** · `activity` / `focus` / `cost` / `errors` inside **Pulse** · `grove` / `browser` inside **Grow** · `history` folded into **Chat** via a toggle.
- **`Todo.md` two-way sync is now active by default.** If you had manual checkbox edits in a marker block, they'll reconcile with the DB on first sync (DB state wins if both changed). Your user-zone lines above/below the marker are left alone.
- **Window geometry changed.** Collapsed bubble is 128×128; it grows when you expand or when any overlay appears. Edit-padding from the screen edge is 56 px (was 16 px) so it clears most Linux taskbars.
- **Hotkeys added.** `Super+/` (spotlight), `Super+Shift+S` (screenshot), `Super+Shift+W` (what-next), `Super+Shift+C` (clipboard). Rebind in Settings → Keybinds.

No breaking changes for third-party seed authors (this is the first release with Seeds).

## ⚠ Known issues

- **AppImage didn't bundle** — `linuxdeploy` crashed during the GTK plugin pass. Use the `.deb`. Fix is queued for v2.3.1.
- **Wayland parity** — distraction-dimmer (`xrandr`), active-window (`xdotool`), and unlock detection (`xscreensaver-command`) are X11-only. Silent no-op on Wayland.
- **Wake word** — not shipping yet. openwakeword integration is planned.
- **Token refresh for Spotify / Zoom / YouTube** — seeds accept a raw access token right now; refresh-token flow is queued. Tokens expire ~1h and need re-pasting.
- **Paid seed licensePublicKey placeholders** — every paid seed's manifest ships with `REPLACE_WITH_BASE64_ED25519_PUBKEY`. Authors need to run `license-gen init <name>` once and swap in their public key before selling. Mentioned in each seed's README.

- **61** sidecar tests, all passing

- **v2.5** (minor): Orchard hosted storefront w/ managed checkout + license delivery, multi-device sync design.
